Grammar landed across AST/parser/IR/resolver. 4 tests PASS (basic, single-field, all-fields, unknown-field-rejection). Emitters return Unsupported for now — T5 scope. UnknownBeliefField error includes valid field list.

Wired KIND_BELIEF_SCALAR_COMPARE into utility eval_predicate; eval_belief_scalar reads via agent_cold_beliefs(). MAX_MODIFIERS bumped 8->16 (Attack at cap). 3 tests PASS (manual belief inject, no-belief baseline, full physics cascade observation).
